stories.title: **Headline:** Kendall Wells Blasts HR No. 35, OU Sets NCAA Single-Season Team Home Run Record in 10-2 Win Over Georgia

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Kendall Wells: 35 home runs. 🥎

OU program record. NCAA team record (165 team HRs). And she's TWO away from tying the all-time individual mark.

Game 2 vs. No. 11 Georgia TODAY — 1:30 PM at Love's Field.

#OUSoftball #CollegeSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
No. 1 OU beat Georgia 10-2 Friday. Wells hit No. 35. 🥎

Oklahoma now has 165 home runs as a team — an NCAA single-season record.

Two more from Wells and she ties Lauren Espinoza's all-time mark.

Game 2 is this afternoon. History is watching.

#OUSoftball #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** Jazzy Francik Throws No-Hitter, Isa Torres Hits Two HRs — FSU Blanks Georgia Tech 4-0

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Jazzy Francik: No-hitter. 🥎

FSU 4, Georgia Tech 0. Francik's second no-hitter of 2026 and third of her career.

Oh, and Isa Torres hit TWO home runs. Again. (She also hit two vs. Florida on Wednesday.)

Game 2 is TONIGHT at 5 PM on ACCN.

#FSUSoftball #CollegeSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Isa Torres has 4 home runs in 3 days. 🥎

Two vs. No. 5 Florida on Wednesday. Two more vs. Georgia Tech on Friday.

No. 13 FSU (41-7, 16-3 ACC) is on fire heading into the final stretch.

Game 2 tonight — 5 PM ET on ACCN.

#FSUSoftball #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** Nebraska Sweeps Iowa Doubleheader, Extends Win Streak to 14 Games in Front of Program Record Crowd

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Nebraska swept Iowa in a doubleheader Friday. 9-1. Then 5-2. 🥎

14-game win streak. 39-6 overall. 19-1 Big Ten.

Program-record crowd of 3,396 showed up to Bowlin Stadium.

Series finale is TODAY at 1 PM CT on B1G+. Win No. 40 is right there.

#HuskerSoftball #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** No. 3 Alabama Opens at No. 8 Tennessee — Penultimate SEC Weekend Has National Seed Implications

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
No. 3 Alabama (43-4, 15-3 SEC) opens at No. 8 Tennessee TODAY — 3 PM CT. 🥎

Both teams in the national seed conversation. Alabama is tied with OU at 15-3 in the SEC.

This is what the penultimate SEC weekend looks like.

#RollTide #SECSoftball #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** No. 2 Texas Tech at Arizona State — Red Raiders' Final Regular-Season Road Trip in Big 12 Play

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
No. 2 Texas Tech (45-4) is at Arizona State this weekend — the Red Raiders' final road series of the regular season. 🥎

NiJaree Canady: 18-3. 1.29 ERA. AUSL Golden Ticket in hand.

Tech needs this series to lock up a top-2 national seed.

#TexasTechSoftball #CollegeSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
15 days until the WCWS selection show. 🥎

May 10 • 7 PM ET • ESPN2

64 teams. 16 national seeds. All top 16 host regionals.

Today's games — OU-Georgia, Nebraska-Iowa, Alabama-Tennessee, FSU-Georgia Tech — are shaping the bracket in real time.

Every game today is a potential poll mover.
